title: taraxacum divinum
intro: Taraxacum divinum, a lesser-known variant of the dandelion, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, due to the presence of taraxasterol and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum divinum include its potential to aid in digestive issues, reduce blood pressure, and support the immune system. The plant can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or taken as a supplement, making it a versatile option for those seeking to harness its medicinal properties.
